false_positive_snippets.description: Using ElementTree to parse untrusted XML data is known to be vulnerable to XML attacks. Replace ElementTree with the equivalent defusedxml package, or make sure defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() is called.

2 from pathlib import Path
3 from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
4 from defusedxml import parse
